diagnostics.message: Trim Heater Outlet 93 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.
Transfer Pump Feed is missing flow rate specification.
Transfer Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.
Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.
Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

标记待连接的下游目标，保留后续由用户指定具体单元或出口。","patch":{"connection_placeholder":{"target_unit_id":"TBD_DOWNSTREAM","note":"待指定下游消费者或出口汇点"}},"risk_level":"high","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-stream-3","snapshot-1"]},{"id":"action-2","kind":"candidate_edit","title":"为 Transfer Pump Feed 补全流量规格占位符","target":{"type":"stream","id":"feed-93"},"rationale":"feed-93 缺少流量规格导致物料平衡无法闭合。添加 mass_flow_kg_h Transfer Pump 出口压力目标","target":{"type":"unit","id":"pump-14"},"rationale":"当前 outlet_pressure_target_kpa=170 低于入口压力 210 kPa，违反泵的基本物理约束。建议提升至 230 kPa（高于入口 20 kPa 压差），同时保留效率参数待优化。","patch":{"parameter_updates":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":{"old_value":170,"proposed_value":230,"rationale":"必须高于入口压力 210 kPa 以产生正向压升"}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-1","flowdoc-stream-1","snapshot-1"]}],"citations":[{"id":"diag-1","type":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[0]"},{"id":"diag-2","type":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[1]"},{"id":"diag-3","type":"diagnostic","ref":"diagnostics[2]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-1","type":"artifact","ref":"artifacts[0].content.streams[0]"},{"id":"flowdoc-stream-3","type":"artifact","ref":"artifacts[0].content.streams[2]"},{"id":"flowdoc-unit-1","type":"artifact","ref":"artifacts[0].content.units[0]"},{"id":"snapshot-1","type":"snapshot","ref":"context.latest_snapshot"}],"requires_confirmation":true}

response.summary: 针对选中的 Transfer Pump (pump-14) 和 Trim Heater (heater-14) 及其关联流股，基于诊断生成三项候选编辑：为未连接的 heater-outlet-93 添加下游连接占位符、为缺失流量规格的 feed-93 补全规格占位符、修正 pump-14 的出口压力目标使其高于入口压力。

answers.text: 已识别三个关键问题：加热器出口流股未连接、泵入口流股缺少流量规格、泵出口压力目标设置错误。建议分步修复，优先处理拓扑连接和规格补全，再调整泵参数。

issues.message: Trim Heater Outlet 93 未连接至任何下游单元或出口
Transfer Pump Feed 缺少流量规格
Transfer Pump 出口压力目标低于入口压力
Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.
Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.

proposed_actions.title: 为 Trim Heater Outlet 93 添加下游连接占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: heater-outlet-93 当前为悬空流股，导致求解器拓扑无效。添加 connection_placeholder 标记待连接的下游目标，保留后续由用户指定具体单元或出口。

proposed_actions.title: 为 Transfer Pump Feed 补全流量规格占位符
proposed_actions.rationale: feed-93 缺少流量规格导致物料平衡无法闭合。添加 mass_flow_kg_h 占位符供用户后续填入实际值。

proposed_actions.title: 修正 Transfer Pump 出口压力目标
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前 outlet_pressure_target_kpa=170 低于入口压力 210 kPa，违反泵的基本物理约束。建议提升至 230 kPa（高于入口 20 kPa 压差），同时保留效率参数待优化。

citations.excerpt: Trim Heater Outlet 93 is not connected to any downstream consumer or export sink.

citations.excerpt: Transfer Pump Feed is missing flow rate specification.

citations.excerpt: Transfer Pump outlet pressure target is lower than the inlet pressure.

citations.label: 诊断 UNIT_PARAMETER_OUT_OF_RANGE
citations.excerpt: Transfer Pump efficiency_percent=54 is outside the recommended operating range.

citations.excerpt: Trim Heater outlet condition may still shift after the downstream sink is restored, so the heater should remain explanatory context only.
